content: TP-114 is blocked by missing prompt-referenced files in the execution snapshot. I confirmed PROMPT/STATUS, created hello.txt and fibonacci.txt, then searched repo-wide. `docs/specifications/framework/taskplane-runtime-v2/01-architecture.md` does not exist (only `docs/specifications/operator-console/*` is present), and there is no `extensions/` tree, so `extensions/taskplane/lane-runner.ts` and `extensions/taskplane/agent-host.ts` are unavailable. I logged the discovery/blocker in STATUS.md. Please advise whether to proceed with best-effort substitutes or restore the referenced files.
